topics: Crystallography: Crystal, space lattice, unit cell, BCC, FCC, HCP structures, coordination number and radius ratio, polymorphism and allotropy. Phase diagrams: Solid solutions, Hume Rothery's rule, equilibrium diagram of common types of binary systems (Cu-Ni, Pb-Sn). Detailed discussion on iron-carbon equilibrium diagram with microstructure and properties. Heat treatments: Annealing, normalizing, hardening, spheroidizing, tempering. Surface hardening methods: No change in surface composition methods (flame, induction, laser and electron beam hardening processes), change in surface composition methods (carburizing and nitriding)
Applications of ferrous and non-ferrous alloys, steel (low, medium, high carbon steels), stainless steels, tool steels
Cast iron (gray, white, ductile), copper and its alloys, aluminium and its alloys, magnesium and alloys
Composites: Classification, fiber phase characteristics, matrix phase functions, characteristics of PMC and CMC, applications of composites
Ceramics, polymers (thermoplastics and thermosetting), nanomaterials, biomaterials, optical fibers
Primary processes: Casting - sand casting, moulds, types of moulding sand, types of patterns, pattern materials
Forging methods: Precision forging, coining, heading, piercing, die design, die materials and lubrication, forging machines
Forming: Extrusion process, hot extrusion, cold
Extrusion: Impact extrusion, wire drawing process
Rolling: Principles of rolling, types of rolling mills, hot and cold rolling, ring rolling, thread rolling, applications (rolling of tubes, wheels, axles and I-beams)

Importance of material selection for manufacturing processes, selection of primary forming process and suitable materials for various products, defects and design considerations in casting, forging and rolling
